revision.comment: Added the page to [[:Category:Module documentation pages]]
revision.text: {{Module rating|protected}} {{High-use|11169}} {{Lua|Module:Box-header/colours|Module:Color contrast}} This module creates the header section for boxed content. It implements {{tl|box-header}}. It is intended to mainly be used in portals, but can also be used elsewhere. == Usage == {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|boxHeader}} :For use in templates; calls _boxHeader with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_boxHeader|args}} :For use in modules; constructs the box header (and the start of the box body). The args are the parameters accepted by [[Template:Box-header]]. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|autoColour}} :For use in templates; calls _autoColour with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_autoColour|args}} :For use in modules; calculates appropriate colours for the box header, and then constructs it using _boxHeader. The args are the parameters accepted by [[Template:Box-header colour]] – the same as for [[Template:Box-header]], apart from those specifying colours and the title. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) ==See also== {{portal templates navbox}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

{{Module rating|protected}} {{High-use|11169}} {{Lua|Module:Box-header/colours|Module:Color contrast}} This module creates the header section for boxed content. It implements {{tl|box-header}}. It is intended to mainly be used in portals, but can also be used elsewhere. == Usage == {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|boxHeader}} :For use in templates; calls _boxHeader with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_boxHeader|args}} :For use in modules; constructs the box header (and the start of the box body). The args are the parameters accepted by [[Template:Box-header]]. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|autoColour}} :For use in templates; calls _autoColour with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_autoColour|args}} :For use in modules; calculates appropriate colours for the box header, and then constructs it using _boxHeader. The args are the parameters accepted by [[Template:Box-header colour]] – the same as for [[Template:Box-header]], apart from those specifying colours and the title. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) ==See also== {{portal templates navbox}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Module rating|protected}} {{High-use|11169}} {{Lua|Module:Box-header/colours|Module:Color contrast}} This module creates the header section for boxed content. It implements {{tl|box-header}}. It is intended to mainly be used in portals, but can also be used elsewhere. == Usage == {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|boxHeader}} :For use in templates; calls _boxHeader with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_boxHeader|args}} :For use in modules; constructs the box header (and the start of the box body). The args are the parameters accepted by [[Template:Box-header]]. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|autoColour}} :For use in templates; calls _autoColour with the parameters passed to the template as arguments. {{#invoke:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|_autoColour|args}} :For use in modules; calculates appropriate colours for the box header, and then constructs it using _boxHeader. The args are the parameters accepted by [[:en:Template:Box-header colour|Template:Box-header colour]] – the same as for [[Template:Box-header]], apart from those specifying colours and the title. (The output may need to be expanded, depending on the values in the args.) ==See also== {{portal templates navbox}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]
